chief_complaint: 71-year-old Asian male patient with gastric variceal bleeding
history: Patient with cirrhosis presented with gastric variceal bleeding. He underwent endoscopic variceal obliteration using histoacryl (N-butyl cyanoacrylate) injection under intravenous anesthesia.
exam: Delayed emergence from anesthesia, remained comatose
labs: Laboratory and imaging examinations revealed multiple systemic embolization involving the brain, heart, spleen, and spinal cord, caused by cyanoacrylate
correct_diagnosis: Multiple systemic embolization caused by cyanoacrylate
differentials: Multiple systemic embolization caused by cyanoacrylate
correct_ranking: Multiple systemic embolization caused by cyanoacrylate
